---
pagetitle: "Positron"
toc: false
editor: source
anchor-links: false
description: |
  Positron unifies exploration and production work in one free, AI-assisted environment, empowering the full spectrum of data science in Python and R.
hide-description: true
image: images/positron-social.png
resources:
  - images/positron-intro-poster.png
format:
  html:
    body-classes: positron-homepage
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <!-- Open Graph Meta Tags -->
          <meta property="og:title" content="Positron - The Data Science IDE">
          <meta property="og:description" content="Positron unifies exploration and production work in one free, AI-assisted environment, empowering the full spectrum of data science in Python and R.">
          <meta property="og:type" content="website">
          <meta property="og:url" content="https://positron.posit.co/">
          <meta property="og:image" content="https://positron.posit.co/images/index-positron-social-share.png">
          <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
          <meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
          <meta property="og:site_name" content="Positron">
          <meta property="og:locale" content="en_US">
---

<!-- ============================== HERO ============================== -->
<section class="hero-section">

<p class="hero-eyebrow">From <a href="https://posit.co/">Posit PBC</a>, the team behind RStudio, Shiny, and the tidyverse</p>

<h1>The Data Science IDE</h1>

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<p class="hero-subheadline">Move from question to insight to application faster in Positron, a free IDE purpose-built for Python and R with transparent, inspectable AI.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<p class="hero-subheadline">Move from question to insight to application faster in Positron, an IDE purpose-built for Python and R with transparent, inspectable AI.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="download.qmd" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Download for Free</a>
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Explore Features</a>
<a href="https://posit.co/positron-updates-signup/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Get Updates</a>
</div>
<p class="hero-meta">Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux. No account required.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Features</a>
<a href="release-notes.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Release Notes</a>
<a href="welcome.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Guides</a>
</div>
:::

<div class="hero-showcase">
<div class="hero-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Feature screenshots">
<button class="hero-tab active" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-controls="panel-data-explorer" id="tab-data-explorer" data-index="0">
<i class="bi bi-table"></i> Data Explorer
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-ai-assistant" id="tab-ai-assistant" data-index="1">
<i class="bi bi-robot"></i> Inspectable AI
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-data-apps" id="tab-data-apps" data-index="2">
<i class="bi bi-window-stack"></i> Data Apps
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-notebooks" id="tab-notebooks" data-index="3">
<i class="bi bi-journal-code"></i> Notebook Editor
</button>
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panels">
<div class="hero-tab-panel active" role="tabpanel" id="panel-data-explorer" aria-labelledby="tab-data-explorer">
<img src="images/index/data explorer.png" alt="Positron Data Explorer showing a tabular data view with filtering and sorting capabilities" loading="eager">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-ai-assistant" aria-labelledby="tab-ai-assistant">
<img src="images/index/python-positron-assistant.png" alt="Positron AI Assistant panel with data-aware suggestions for Python code" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-data-apps" aria-labelledby="tab-data-apps">
<img src="images/index/app-viewer.png" alt="Building and previewing a data app in Positron" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-notebooks" aria-labelledby="tab-notebooks">
<img src="images/index/jupyter-variables-pane.png" alt="Positron native notebook editor for interactive data science workflows" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

</section>

<!-- ========================== VIDEO ================================ -->
::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<section class="video-demo-section">

<h2>See it in action</h2>

<p class="video-demo-description">Watch a quick overview of Positron's key features and see how it streamlines your data science workflow.</p>

<div class="video-demo-container">
<video controls preload="none" poster="images/positron-intro-poster.png" aria-label="Introducing Positron, the data science IDE" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);">
<source src="videos/positron-intro.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
</div>

</section>
:::

<!-- ========================= VALUE PROPS ========================== -->
<section class="value-props-section">

<h2>Stop context-switching between tools</h2>

<p class="value-props-subtitle">Positron is built for data science workflows. Execute code interactively in a native console or notebook, explore data, view variables and dataframes, create visualizations, train models, build apps, and access everything else you need to stay in the flow.</p>

<div class="feature-showcase" data-showcase="workflow">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="workflow-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Python & R</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Code efficiently with first-class support for both R and Python.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Data Explorer</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Sort, filter, and profile large datasets with fast, interactive data frames.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Rapid visualizations</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Create high-quality visualizations quickly to uncover patterns and communicate findings effectively.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-3">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Jupyter & Quarto Notebooks</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Iteratively explore data in a batteries-included native editor for Jupyter and Quarto notebooks. Create reproducible reports, presentations, and websites that combine code, results, and narrative.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-4">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Production Apps</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Easily convert explorations into production scripts, data apps, and reports.</div>
</button>
</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="workflow-0">
<img src="images/index/python-r-console.png" alt="Positron with first-class Python and R support" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-1">
<img src="images/index/data explorer.png" alt="Positron Data Explorer showing tabular data" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-2">
<img src="images/index/plots-pane.png" alt="Positron Plots pane displaying charts and visualizations with export options" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-3">
<img src="images/index/jupyter-variables-pane.png" alt="Positron notebook editor with variables pane" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-4">
<img src="images/index/app-viewer.png" alt="Building and previewing a data app in Positron" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2>AI that actually understands your data</h2>

<p class="value-props-subtitle">Positron Assistant sees your active dataframes, console output, and plots so every suggestion is grounded in your actual work. Transparent, inspectable, and always under your control.</p>

<div class="feature-showcase feature-showcase-reversed" data-showcase="ai">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="ai-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Data-aware AI</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Positron Assistant has context about your loaded data, plots, and console history, enabling more relevant guidance for data science tasks.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="ai-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Exploratory Agent</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Accelerate exploratory data analysis with Databot, an agent that collaborates with you to provide transparent insights.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="ai-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Bring your own model</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Connect your preferred AI provider with just an API key. All AI traffic goes directly from your machine to your chosen provider.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="ai-3">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Notebook assistant</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Assistant understands the full context of your Jupyter notebook from code cells to outputs and execution history. Use AI quick actions to generate code and AI next steps to guide your analysis.</div>
</button>

</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="ai-0">
<img src="images/index/python-positron-assistant.png" alt="Positron AI Assistant using dataframe and session context to generate relevant code" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="ai-1">
<img src="images/index/databot.png" alt="Positron Databot agent for exploratory data analysis" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="ai-2">
<img src="images/index/configure-model-provider.png" alt="Positron AI model provider configuration showing Anthropic, OpenAI, and other providers" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="ai-3">
<img src="images/index/jupyter-variables-pane.png" alt="Positron AI assistant providing contextual help inside a Jupyter notebook" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2>Built on a platform you can grow with</h2>

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<p class="value-props-subtitle">Start with a free desktop IDE and expand as your needs evolve. Connect to your data, extend with thousands of plugins, and scale to Workbench for enterprise when you're ready.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<p class="value-props-subtitle">Connect to your data, extend with thousands of plugins, and scale with enterprise-grade infrastructure.</p>
:::

<div class="feature-showcase" data-showcase="production">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="production-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Connect to your data</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Create connections to databases like Databricks, Snowflake, and Postgres directly from Positron. Browse schemas, preview tables, and start querying without leaving your editor.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="production-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Leverage extensions</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Access the Open VSX marketplace for language support, themes, linters, formatters, and thousands of extensions.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="production-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Publish and share</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Deploy reports, dashboards, and data apps to Posit Connect or Posit Connect Cloud with a single click.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="production-3">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Scale beyond your laptop</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Connect to remote servers via SSH or run Positron in the browser through Posit Workbench when you need more CPU, RAM, or GPU than your local machine provides.</div>
</button>
</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="production-0">
<img src="images/index/connect-data.png" alt="Positron Connections pane showing database connections" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="production-1">
<img src="images/index/extensions.png" alt="Positron extensions marketplace with thousands of available extensions" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="production-2">
<img src="images/index/publish-notebook.png" alt="Publishing a notebook to Posit Connect from Positron" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="production-3">
<img src="images/index/workbench.png" alt="Positron running in the browser through Posit Workbench" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

</section>

<!-- ======================== TESTIMONIALS ============================ -->
<section class="testimonials-section">

<h2>Hear from the community</h2>

<div class="testimonials-grid">

<div class="testimonial-card">
<blockquote>"Positron feels like the perfect balance between VS Code and RStudio."</blockquote>
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">SP</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Sam Parmar</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Statistical Data Scientist, Pfizer</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<blockquote>"Positron didn't just make Python accessible, it made it fun."</blockquote>
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">MH</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Meghan S. Harris</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Data Scientist, Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<blockquote>"The combination of Positron and the AI Assistant makes switching between R &amp; Python incredibly smooth."</blockquote>
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">YR</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Yanan Ren</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Senior Statistician, Medtronic</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</section>

<!-- ============================== FAQ =============================== -->
<section class="faq-section">

<h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>

<div class="faq-accordion">

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<details class="faq-item">
<summary>Is Positron free?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
Yes! Positron is free to download and use. It is source-available under the <a href="https://github.com/posit-dev/positron?tab=License-1-ov-file#readme">Elastic License 2.0</a>. <a href="licensing.qmd">Learn more</a> about what this license means and our decision to use it.
</div>
</details>
:::

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>What about RStudio?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
RStudio is not going away. Posit is committed to maintaining it with security updates, stability improvements, and priority bug fixes. Positron builds on the data-science-first experience of RStudio and adds modern editor capabilities like extensions, AI assistance, and first-class Python support. Positron includes RStudio keybindings to make the transition easier. If you are new to R, we recommend starting with Positron. If you're happy with RStudio, you can continue using it. <a href="faqs.html#is-rstudio-going-away">Learn more</a>.
</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>How is Positron different from VS Code?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
Positron is purpose-built for data science with dedicated panes for data exploration, variables, plots, and a native console, all ready immediately with zero configuration. VS Code is a general purpose code editor that requires installing and configuring multiple extensions to approximate a data science workflow, and does not officially support R. Positron supports VS Code compatible extensions, so you can bring your existing tools with you. <a href="faqs.html#how-is-positron-different-from-rstudio-vs-code-or-jupyter-notebooks">Learn more</a>.
</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>How is Positron different from Jupyter Notebook editors?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
Positron is a full IDE that goes beyond notebook editing. You get a batteries-included native notebook editor for Jupyter, plus a built-in data explorer, variables pane, plots viewer, database connections, AI assistance, debugging, version control and more, all without having to manage your own extensions. <a href="faqs.html#how-is-positron-different-from-rstudio-vs-code-or-jupyter-notebooks">Learn more</a>.
</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>What languages and tools does Positron support?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
R and Python are first-class supported languages with a native console, data explorer, and variables pane. Additional languages like Rust, JavaScript, and C/C++ are supported through community extensions. SQL support is on the roadmap. Positron also supports Jupyter and Quarto notebooks, Shiny, Streamlit, and Dash apps, and thousands of extensions from the Open VSX marketplace. <a href="faqs.html#what-programming-languages-are-supported-in-positron">Learn more</a>.
</div>
</details>

</div>

<p class="faq-more"><a href="faqs.qmd">View all frequently asked questions →</a></p>

</section>

<!-- ========================== CLOSING CTA =========================== -->
<section class="closing-cta-section">

<h2>Ready to get started?</h2>

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<p class="closing-cta-description">Download Positron for free and start building with Python and R today.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<p class="closing-cta-description">Start building with Python and R in Positron today.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="download.qmd" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Download for Free</a>
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Explore Features</a>
<a href="https://posit.co/positron-updates-signup/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Get Updates</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Features</a>
<a href="release-notes.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Release Notes</a>
<a href="welcome.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Guides</a>
</div>
:::

</section>

<!-- ========================= LICENSE NOTE =========================== -->
::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<p class="license-note">
Positron™ is licensed under the <a href="https://github.com/posit-dev/positron?tab=License-1-ov-file#readme">Elastic License 2.0</a>, a source-available license. <a href="licensing.qmd">Read more</a> about what this license means and our decision to use it.
</p>
:::

<!-- ========================= TAB SCRIPT ============================ -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Hero tabs
  var heroTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-tab');
  var heroPanels = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-tab-panel');

  heroTabs.forEach(function(tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
      heroTabs.forEach(function(t) {
        t.classList.remove('active');
        t.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      });
      heroPanels.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
      tab.classList.add('active');
      tab.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
      document.getElementById(tab.getAttribute('aria-controls')).classList.add('active');
    });

    tab.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      var index = parseInt(tab.getAttribute('data-index'));
      var newIndex = -1;
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') newIndex = (index + 1) % heroTabs.length;
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') newIndex = (index - 1 + heroTabs.length) % heroTabs.length;
      if (newIndex >= 0) { e.preventDefault(); heroTabs[newIndex].click(); heroTabs[newIndex].focus(); }
    });
  });

  // Feature showcase tabs
  document.querySelectorAll('.feature-showcase').forEach(function(showcase) {
    var navItems = showcase.querySelectorAll('.feature-nav-item');
    var panels = showcase.querySelectorAll('.feature-panel');

    navItems.forEach(function(item) {
      item.addEventListener('click', function() {
        navItems.forEach(function(n) { n.classList.remove('active'); });
        panels.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
        item.classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById(item.getAttribute('data-target')).classList.add('active');
      });
    });
  });
});
</script>
